title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China revealed JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid with a split AI brain. Vietnam unveiled two new humanoids including Dyno and VR-H3 for homes, security, and factories. NVIDIA released the Isaac GR00T robot platform with six-foot form factor and 2000+ teraflops of onboard AI compute.
